recent_announcements.summary: Eveready Industries India Limited has informed the Exchange that Record date for the purpose of Dividend & Meeting  is 04-Aug-2026. |SUBJECT: Record Date

The Exchange has sought clarification from Pfizer Limited with respect to recent news item captioned Pfizer suspends Premarin vaginal cream in India, raising concerns over menopause care..  The response from the Company is awaited. |SUBJECT: News Verification
Disclosure under Regulation 6(1) |SUBJECT: Disclosure under Regulation 6(1)

NRB wishes to inform you that our wholly owned subsidiary, Mahant Tool Room Private Limited ("MTRPL") has completed the acquisition of the business of M/s. Mahant Tool Room (MTR) (a sole proprietorship concern) today, i.e., July 17, 2026. |SUBJECT: General Updates
